description: Composition Black sleeveless top, made of 100% cotton, has a scooped neck and a racer back design with a metallic zip Fit Relaxed Wash care Wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Dry inside out Warm iron; do not iron on decorations A basic top to pep up your training sessions or your casual wardrobe, this black top from femella has a unique style quotient that truly represents the woman of today. The racer back design and the soft cotton fabric will keep you in exemplary comfort all day. Wear it with form fitting denims and style with understated accessories and peep-toe shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
